title: light mediterranean sevaiiya pilaf
description: a light mediterranean dish featuring sevaiiya, bonito flakes, and a hint of mustard. perfect for a quick weeknight dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: sevaiiya (rice noodles)
ingredients.notes: look for brown rice noodles for a nuttier flavor

ingredients.name: bonito flakes
ingredients.notes: can be found in most asian grocery stores or online

instructions: heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat
add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant
add the bonito flakes and cook for 1-2 minutes, until they start to smell like the sea
add the sevaiiya noodles and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they are slightly browned
add the lemon juice, mustard, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine
cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are coated in the sauce
transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and top with chopped parsley and grated romano cheese (if using)
